calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Settlement Of Quiet Title Action Pending Appeal And Approval Of Petitioners Attorneys Fees And Expenses
Off Calendar Sep-24-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Richard Canatella appearing for administrator. Richard Collier appearing for respondent. The settlement agreement has been signed. Mr. Collier has the signature pages. He has file his declaration in response to examiner's notes. He will use this order approval settlement in the Quiet Title action for judgment. The respondent will pay the estate in 10 days. Mr. Canatella stated he is seek less fees than he is entitled to. Court did not have any problems approving less fees. Order signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Rob Harris.

Verified Petn. For Recovery Of Title And Possession Of Real Prop. Belonging To The Estate; For Establishment And Imposition Of Constructive Trust; Quiet Title And Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-23-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Richard Canatella appearing for administrator Xenia Dolan. Richard Collier appearing for respondents Kevin, Lawrence and Terrance Costello. Jurisdiction issue argued. Court will stay the matter until after the hearing on the Quiet Title action. Order is taken under submission. Court will hold the order for 4 days.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR# 1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.
